## Summary
- Describe the user-facing or API-facing change.
- Call out the main implementation areas touched.

## Why
- Explain the bug, requirement, or gap this PR addresses.
- Note any constraints or tradeoffs reviewers should know about.

## Testing
- List the commands you ran locally.
- Mention any gaps if a scenario could not be exercised.

## Notes
- Add rollout considerations, follow-up work, or dependency/version context.
